title: Auto Wood Stripper
description: Added automation for wood stripping mechanic in Minecraft!
body:
Auto Wood Stripper Mod 🌲

Introducing the Auto Wood Stripper Mod, a time-saving solution for every Minecraft builder! Tired of manually stripping logs? With this mod, you can automate the process and let redstone and axes do all the work for you! This mod adds a special crafting table that automatically strips wood when connected to a redstone signal, allowing you to focus on more important tasks while your logs are prepared for construction. 🪓✨

📋 Key Features:

- Automated Wood Stripping: No more manual labor! Strip logs automatically using a redstone-powered crafting table. ⚙️
- Redstone-Activated: Control the stripping process with a simple redstone signal — perfect for automation lovers. 🔴
- Efficient and Time-Saving: Save time by automating repetitive tasks, making it easier to gather stripped wood for your builds. ⏳
- Tool Compatibility: Use axes for stripping, which are consumed during the process, adding a balanced resource management mechanic. 🪓

This mod is perfect for players who love automation and want to streamline their wood processing. Whether you’re a builder creating large wooden structures or simply looking for more efficiency in your resource gathering, Auto Wood Stripper Mod will make your life easier!
